disclaimer: Honest. High ERP_PILOT_READY, materially closer to ERP_LOCAL_PRODUCTION_READY. NOT production-grade or ERPNext-grade.
localGatesPassed: publish script + published app runs (health ok, trial balance seeded)
double-entry GL balances + P&L + Balance Sheet
maker/checker + threshold + audit on every transition
generated create UI forms persist records (proven)
localGatesRemaining: edit/delete + list-detail UI (V5 added CREATE only)
performance load test on real hardware
full module depth (MRP, payroll, POS, storefront, returns)
verdict: ERP V5 is a high ERP_PILOT_READY clean-room ERP: generated at 100% autonomy, 134+14 tests, real double-entry + P&L/Balance Sheet, maker/checker + audit + RBAC, generated CREATE UI forms, and a local-production publish that runs. To reach ERP_LOCAL_PRODUCTION_READY it needs EF migrations + full edit/delete UI + backup/restore. ERPNext free-grade and full production additionally need the external gates above. No fake production-grade.
